# Ruby on Rails Monolith Application Guidelines

This is a Rails 7+ application using jQuery and vanilla JavaScript. Slim templates are used for views. It follows a monolith architecture with a focus on maintainability. The application is structured around the MVC pattern, with clear separation of concerns between models, views, and controllers. Background jobs are used for long-running tasks.

# Instructions
The full instruction set is found in the root AGENTS.md.

Coding conventions are in docs/conventions/code.md.
